facebook.caption: Tucked away on the quieter Ông Lang coast, Chen Sea Resort & Spa Phu Quoc earns its 4.6-star reputation with good reason. The minimalist villas feel genuinely private, the infinity pool looks straight out onto the Gulf of Thailand, and the open-air gym means you can skip a workout with a sea breeze as your excuse. Dining is on-site, so you never have to rush anywhere. Practical tip: Ông Lang beach is calmer and less crowded than the south, making Chen Sea a great base if you want a peaceful alternative to the busier resort strips.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the infinity pool blur right into the horizon, villas peeking through the palms, and that open-air gym with a view that makes exercise feel optional. Chen Sea Resort & Spa Phu Quoc on the Ông Lang coast is giving quiet-luxury energy, and the Gulf of Thailand backdrop does all the heavy lifting.

instagram.caption: Minimalist villas, an infinity pool that melts into the Gulf of Thailand, and the peaceful Ông Lang shoreline right outside your door. Chen Sea Resort & Spa Phu Quoc is the quiet-luxury escape the island does so well. Rated 4.6 from 869 reviews, and honestly, you can see why.
instagram.video_caption: Infinity pool. Palm-framed villas. An open-air gym with zero excuses needed. Chen Sea Resort & Spa Phu Quoc on the Ông Lang coast is a whole vibe, and the Gulf of Thailand is just there in the background, no big deal.

tiktok.caption: This quiet corner of Phu Quoc just reset my whole standard for beach resorts. Chen Sea Resort & Spa, Ông Lang coast. Go. #PhuQuoc #ChenSeaResort #LuxuryTravel #VietnamTravel
